description: This file implements a MySQL repository for managing bookmarks in the 'multiverse_bookmarks' table, including functions for upserting, deleting, and listing bookmarks.

methods.name: upsertBookmark
methods.description: Inserts or updates a bookmark record in the database.

methods.name: deleteBookmark
methods.description: Deletes a bookmark record from the database.

methods.name: listBookmarks
methods.description: Retrieves a list of bookmarks for a user, optionally filtered by type.
